body.strip_none: for dicts, coerce keys to str and omit items whose value is None; for lists, recursively process each item and keep list positions; for scalars, keep value unchanged
body.hash_output: lowercase sha256 hex without sha256: prefix
body.hash_field_normalization: if a string starts with sha256:, remove that prefix; strip outer whitespace; blank or non-string is missing
body.workflow_declaration_id: workflow_declaration_id if nonblank string else id if nonblank string
body.workflow_amendment_id: workflow_amendment_id if nonblank string else id if nonblank string

intent_extraction.first: intent_json if it is an object, stripped of None recursively
intent_extraction.second: intent if it is an object, stripped of None recursively
intent_extraction.validation: expected_calls, max_calls, expected_input_tokens_per_call, expected_output_tokens_per_call, max_duration_seconds are optional non-negative ints excluding bool; expected_calls or max_calls is required; expected_calls must be <= max_calls when both present; expected_model must be string or null

body.principal_payload: if principal object has type api_key or dashboard_session and string id, emit api_key_id or dashboard_session_id; otherwise emit non-null api_key_id/dashboard_session_id fallback fields
body.projected_cost_payload: projected_cost dict stripped of None if present; else amount_micros from projection_amount_micros, currency from projection_currency default USD, methodology from projection_methodology, stripped of None
body.issued_at_candidates: include raw stripped timestamp string if nonblank; also include parse_iso_or_none(value).astimezone(UTC).isoformat() if parseable and distinct
declaration_signature_payload_candidates: record.signed_payload copied with binding_key_id setdefault to resolved key id when signed_payload is an object

for each issued_at candidate from declaration_signed_at or declared_at or created_at: binding_version workflow_declaration.v1, project_id, workflow_id, intent, budget_envelope_id, declared_by, projected_cost, status, issued_at, binding_key_id
body.amendment_delta: record.delta dict stripped of None if present; else fields applied_against_version, previous_max_calls, new_max_calls, previous_expected_calls, new_expected_calls, reason_provided stripped of None
amendment_signature_payload_candidates: record.signed_payload copied with binding_key_id setdefault to resolved key id when signed_payload is an object
for each issued_at candidate from amendment_signed_at or created_at, emit base plus delta under delta
base plus workflow_amendment_id and delta under delta
base plus workflow_amendment_id and flattened delta fields

key_resolution.artifact_public_key: never accepted from closure or workflow records

artifact_key_id_sources.closure: none during trust-root resolution; binding_key_id is checked after public-key resolution
artifact_key_id_sources.workflow: record.binding_key_id if string else record.key_id if string else none

manifest_resolution.source: key_manifest_source_for_args(args): explicit key_manifest/key_manifest_url if supplied; none if self_attested is true; else cached ~/.keel-verifier/trust-root.json when present; else bundled keel_verifier/data/trust_root.json
priority: expected_public_key is not supplied on current closure/workflow verifier paths
resolved key_manifest_source entries filtered by purpose, key_id when supplied, and signing_time active window
manifest_resolution.public_key_url: not supported for closure or workflow verifier paths
manifest_resolution.embedded_public_key: not accepted; artifact_pub is always None for closure and workflow records
manifest_resolution.self_attested_effect: self_attested disables key_manifest_source but provides no embedded artifact key, so current closure/workflow verification cannot resolve a trust key in that mode
manifest_resolution.manifest_key_id_rule: if artifact key_id is present, select the first manifest key with matching purpose and key_id
manifest_resolution.legacy_no_key_id_rule: if no key_id and signing time is parseable, require exactly one purpose-matching manifest entry active at signing time; if signing time is absent/unparseable, require exactly one purpose-matching entry total
manifest_resolution.active_window_rule: An absent or null valid_from/valid_to is open-ended; a present non-null value that does not parse to a valid timestamp makes the manifest entry malformed and excludes it from matching any signing_time (fail-closed).

signature_verification.canonical_hash_match: record canonical hash must equal one of the candidate payload hashes
signature_verification.signed_message: canonical hash string encoded as UTF-8

verification.public_key_decode: remove optional ed25519: prefix, base64-decode remaining text, Ed25519PublicKey.from_public_bytes
verification.signature_decode: remove optional ed25519: prefix, base64-decode remaining text

body.amendment_order: for each declaration id in sorted order, amendments are evaluated in input order and must be nondecreasing by (created_at parsed, amendment id); applied_against_version must count from 1; declaration.version must equal final expected version
body.effective_intent_hash: sha256 over concatenated UTF-8 canonical workflow JSON chunks: declaration intent first, then amendment deltas ordered by (created_at parsed, amendment id); when before_created_at is supplied, exclude amendments whose created_at >= cutoff; no delimiter is inserted between chunks
body.permit_snapshot: extract workflow_state_json or workflow_state from record first then nested permit; permit time is first parseable of created_at, timestamp, permit_created_at on record then permit; if snapshot admission_state is unknown_or_inactive and declaration id is missing, skip; otherwise snapshot effective_intent_hash and declaration_version_at_decision must match declaration/amendments before permit time
body.workflow_evidence_document: schema must equal keel.vanta.workflow_evidence/v1; declarations and amendments must be lists; declaration_count and amendment_count must exactly equal their list lengths
